Title: Genome-wide discovery of tissue-specific miRNAs in clusterbean (Cyamopsis tetragonoloba) indicates their association with galactomannan biosynthesis

Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Higher MAN9 expression in seed and bud is associated with galactomannan biosynthesis; inverse correlation with Ct-miR3130 and Ct-miR3135 suggests miRNA-mediated repression reduces mannan backbone synthesis potential.
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Higher in seed and bud; low/insignificant in vegetative tissues.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: tissue/developmental context (root, stem, leaf, bud, seed)
Common_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: mannan synthase / cellulose synthase-like A family-related galactomannan synthase component
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RA-RT-PCR target cleavage validation; qRT-PCR expression profiling; miRNA-target prediction
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MAN9 was identified as a galactomannan pathway target transcript. 2. Its expression showed an inverse relationship with Ct-miR3130 and Ct-miR3135. 3. MAN9 accumulated strongly in reproductive tissues, consistent with seed galactomannan deposition.
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Paper also discusses CSLA9 as mannan synthase 9 in the galactomannan model; MAN9 is the experimentally validated target name used in RA-RT-PCR.

Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: UGE supplies UDP-galactose building blocks for galactomannan side-chain formation; inverse correlation with Ct-miR3157 suggests miRNA-mediated repression can reduce precursor supply for galactomannan biosynthesis.
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Higher in seed and bud; low/insignificant in vegetative tissues.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: tissue/developmental context (root, stem, leaf, bud, seed)
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RA-RT-PCR target cleavage validation; qRT-PCR expression profiling; miRNA-target prediction
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. UGE was annotated as a novel unigene target linked to galactomannan biosynthesis. 2. UGE expression was inversely correlated with Ct-miR3157. 3. High expression in seed/bud supports a role in UDP-galactose supply during galactomannan accumulation.
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: The paper explicitly validated UGE as one of two galactomannan-pathway targets of novel miRNAs.

Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: represses MAN9 expression through cleavage-associated targeting
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Acts through miRNA-mediated silencing machinery (RISC), not directly tested
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Relatively higher in vegetative tissues than reproductive tissues; qRT-PCR fold expression 47.8 in vegetative comparison noted.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Negative regulator of galactomannan biosynthesis by targeting MAN9; lower Ct-miR3130 in reproductive tissues is associated with higher MAN9 expression and galactomannan accumulation.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Condition-dependent repressor of a key mannan synthase transcript validated in the paper.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: small RNA-seq differential expression; qRT-PCR validation; RA-RT-PCR target cleavage assay
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Ct-miR3130 was identified as a tissue-specific miRNA linked to galactomannan biosynthesis. 2. It showed inverse expression with MAN9. 3. RA-RT-PCR supported cleavage specificity toward MAN9 transcripts.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Called novel in summary text but listed as known in Table 4 and Table 3 inconsistently; treated here as core regulatory miRNA validated experimentally.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Reducing Ct-miR3130 activity in developing seeds may elevate MAN9 expression and increase galactomannan content, but seed-specific deployment would be advisable.

Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: represses MAN9 expression through cleavage-associated targeting
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Acts through miRNA-mediated silencing machinery (RISC), not directly tested
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Relatively higher in vegetative tissues than reproductive tissues; qRT-PCR showed 7.5-fold higher expression in vegetative tissues.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Negative regulator of galactomannan biosynthesis by targeting MAN9; reduced expression in seed/bud permits higher MAN9 expression and galactomannan deposition.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Validated repressor of a galactomannan pathway gene with clear inverse tissue expression.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: small RNA-seq differential expression; qRT-PCR validation; RA-RT-PCR target cleavage assay
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Ct-miR3135 was one of the three validated galactomannan-related miRNAs. 2. It targeted MAN9 and showed inverse expression to the target. 3. The expression pattern supports repression in vegetative tissues and relief of repression in reproductive tissues.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Explicitly described as a novel miRNA in the paper.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Seed-specific suppression of Ct-miR3135 could be explored to increase galactomannan biosynthesis via MAN9 derepression.

Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: UDP-galactose precursor supply for galactomannan biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: represses UGE expression through cleavage-associated targeting
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Acts through miRNA-mediated silencing machinery (RISC), not directly tested
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Relatively higher in vegetative tissues than reproductive tissues; qRT-PCR showed 8.37-fold higher expression in vegetative tissues.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Negative regulator of galactomannan biosynthesis by targeting UGE, thereby potentially restricting UDP-galactose supply for side-chain synthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Validated repressor of a precursor-supply enzyme directly linked to galactomannan pathway.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: small RNA-seq differential expression; qRT-PCR validation; RA-RT-PCR target cleavage assay
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Ct-miR3157 targeted the UGE unigene involved in galactomannan biosynthesis. 2. It displayed an inverse relationship with UGE across tissues. 3. RA-RT-PCR confirmed cleavage-associated regulation.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Explicitly described as a novel miRNA in the paper.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Lowering Ct-miR3157 in reproductive tissues could enhance UGE expression and UDP-galactose supply for galactomannan enrichment.
